## Summary

- 

## Checks

- [ ] Backend tests pass: `python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider`
- [ ] Frontend builds: `npm run build`
- [ ] Docker Compose validates: `docker compose config --quiet`
- [ ] Retrieval or recommendation changes include deterministic evaluation notes

## Provenance And Licensing

- [ ] Source URLs are preserved on answers, recommendations, and indexed chunks
- [ ] Commit SHA and repo metadata are preserved where content is ingested
- [ ] License family metadata is preserved or explicitly handled
- [ ] No large source excerpts were copied into docs, tests, or fixtures

## Evaluation Notes

Describe query sets, metrics, and deterministic tie-breaking behavior for retrieval or recommendation changes.
